commands.repair_reason: - [P2] There is no narrow automated repair target; maintainers need to accept or decline the new build env surface and handle normal failed-check gating.; Cleared: The diff only changes numeric environment parsing in a build wrapper plus targeted tests; it does not alter dependencies, lockfiles, workflows, permissions, downloads, or secrets. commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an `OPENCLAW_TSDOWN_MAX_OLD_SPACE_MB` override to the tsdown build wrapper and tests override precedence, inherited `NODE_OPTIONS`, and malformed values.

PR surface: Tests +41, Other +9. Total +50 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR adds a build-time override rather than reporting a current-main bug. Source inspection confirms current main lacks a dedicated tsdown heap override and currently forces heap sizing through the resolver.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] There is no narrow automated repair target; maintainers need to accept or decline the new build env surface and handle normal failed-check gating.
